name: Sade
bio: Sade's catalog continues to monetize through calm-playlist dominance, enduring vocal recognition, and deep catalog loyalty across decades.
notable_for: Elegant recordings with exceptional long-tail replay value.
career_highlight: Signature songs continue to perform strongly across streaming, late-night playlists, and sync-sensitive use cases.
revenue_drivers: Streaming playlists focused on calm, soul, and late-night listening support recurring revenue.
Cross-generational listener familiarity keeps the core catalog active.
Selective sync use and prestige cultural placement support long-tail value.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Sade's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Sade's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
